canonical_definition: An ARC-style benchmark where each task is designed to exemplify a single, isolated high-level concept, allowing for more targeted evaluation of specific reasoning abilities.
papers: Combining Induction and Transduction for Abstract Reasoning
KiVA: Kid-inspired Visual Analogies for Testing Large Multimodal Models
